app.name: Pix2pi
panel.title: Merchant Panel
auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.tenant_select.title: Business selection
auth.errors.TENANT_REQUIRED: Business selection is required to continue.
auth.errors.TENANT_FORBIDDEN: This user cannot access the selected business.
auth.errors.SESSION_EXPIRED: Session expired. Please sign in again.
auth.errors.NETWORK_ERROR: Could not reach the server. Please try again.
pos.title: POS Sales Screen
marketplace.title: Marketplace
layout.font_family: Inter, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, Segoe UI, sans-serif

login.title: Signing in
login.body: Sign in from the panel with your email and password. Select your tenant when prompted.

business.title: Creating a business
business.body: Enter business name, tax details, address, sector, default language, and default currency.

party.title: Adding an account
party.body: Add customer or supplier information from the account screen and verify tax and address fields.

product.title: Adding a product
product.body: Enter product name, barcode, SKU, category, unit, sale price, VAT rate, and stock information.

posSale.title: Making a POS sale
posSale.body: Select the register in POS, add products to the cart, choose payment type, and complete the sale.

report.title: Viewing reports
report.body: View daily sales, stock, account balance, and VAT reports from the reports screen.

language.title: Changing language
language.body: Choose Turkish, Ottoman Turkish, Arabic, Persian, or English from the language selector.

smoke.title: Help center smoke test
smoke.body: Help center documents are verified with live URLs, i18n keys, and DB smoke records.
